# Citizenship Italia

> Citizenship Italia is a Toronto-based Italian citizenship by descent firm serving Americans. We offer end-to-end services for consulate applications, court (ATQ) cases, and 1948 maternal line cases. Licensed Italian legal representation included.

## Core Services

- [How It Works](https://citizenshipitalia.com/process.html) — 6-step end-to-end process for Italian citizenship by descent (Jure Sanguinis)
- [Check Eligibility](https://citizenshipitalia.com/check-eligibility.html) — Free 2-minute eligibility quiz for Italian citizenship by descent
- [Pricing](https://citizenshipitalia.com/pricing.html) — Service packages for consulate, court (ATQ), and 1948 routes
- [Our Team](https://citizenshipitalia.com/our-team.html) — Licensed Italian lawyers and citizenship specialists

## Application Routes

- [Against the Queue (ATQ) Court Route](https://citizenshipitalia.com/routes/court-atq/) — How to bypass consulate backlogs via direct Italian court filing (azione di accertamento)
- [1948 Maternal Line Cases](https://citizenshipitalia.com/routes/1948-cases/) — Court route for citizenship transmitted through a female ancestor before 1948

## Key Legal Guides

- [What is Jure Sanguinis?](https://citizenshipitalia.com/resources/what-is-jure-sanguinis.html) — Complete guide to Italian citizenship by right of blood
- [Law 74/2025 Explained](https://citizenshipitalia.com/resources/law-74-2025.html) — Italy's 2025 generational limit law: who is affected and what changed
- [The Minor Issue Risk](https://citizenshipitalia.com/resources/minor-issue/) — How a naturalisation event can break the Italian citizenship line (Law 555/1912)
- [Court vs Consulate Comparison](https://citizenshipitalia.com/resources/court-vs-consulate/) — Side-by-side comparison of application routes with timelines and costs
- [How to Get Started](https://citizenshipitalia.com/resources/how-to-get-started.html) — Step-by-step guide to beginning a Jure Sanguinis application

## Document Guides

- [Apostille and Translation Requirements](https://citizenshipitalia.com/documents/apostille-and-translations/) — Complete guide to apostilles and certified translations by country and route
- [Naturalisation Proof Hub](https://citizenshipitalia.com/documents/naturalisation-proof/) — How to source and use USCIS/NARA naturalisation records and Certificates of Non-Existence
- [Full Documents Checklist](https://citizenshipitalia.com/resources/documents-checklist.html) — Every document required for a Jure Sanguinis application

## Location-Specific Guides

- [Italian Citizenship for Americans](https://citizenshipitalia.com/locations/united-states/) — US consulates, USCIS records, and state-specific guidance

## FAQ & Reference

- [Full Italian Citizenship FAQ](https://citizenshipitalia.com/resources/faq.html) — 16+ questions answered on eligibility, routes, Law 74/2025, costs, and timelines
- [Consulate Appointment Guide](https://citizenshipitalia.com/resources/consulate-appointment-guide/) — What to expect, what to bring, and how to prepare

## Blog & Updates

- [Blog](https://citizenshipitalia.com/blog/) — Legal updates, case outcomes, and Italian citizenship news
- [Law 74/2025 Impact Update (2026)](https://citizenshipitalia.com/blog/law-74-2025-impact-2026/) — Analysis of the 2025 law one year on
- [Italian Consulate Wait Times 2026](https://citizenshipitalia.com/blog/consulate-wait-times-2026/) — Current wait time estimates by jurisdiction

## Contact

- Phone: +1 437-562-7327
- Email: team@citizenshipitalia.com
- Free consultation: https://citizenshipitalia.com/check-eligibility.html

## About

Citizenship Italia helps Americans of Italian descent reclaim their Italian (EU) citizenship. We provide end-to-end services including lineage verification, document procurement, certified translation, apostille processing, and licensed Italian legal representation for all three application routes: consulate, ATQ court, and 1948 cases. All court filings since Law 74/2025 are centralized at the Court of Rome.

For comprehensive documentation, see: https://citizenshipitalia.com/llms-full.txt
